course_title: RESEARCH STRATEGIES AND ANALYSIS IN CLINICAL GENETICS
description: Introduction to a variety of tools and resources commonly used in clinical genetics. Learn to critique these resources and start thinking about developing their own research projects. Emphasizes developing oral presentation skills through a variety of student presentations.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Master of Genetic Counselor Studies

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Master of Genetic Counselor Studies
